title: Wrench
discoveryHint: Craft a Wrench to discover this page.

sections.text: The Wrench is a crafting tool and machine interaction tool. Right-click a machine to change its output face. Shift-right-click to change the front face. It also doubles as a Forge Wrench for other mods and can mine GregTech machines without needing a pickaxe.
The output face and front face cannot be the same side. The output face is marked with a dot or hole, typically the back of the machine.
